name: Hilt Pay

live_truth.protocol: x402 protected-resource protocol over the live settlement path
live_truth.zero_custody: Buyers pay from their own wallet. Merchants settle to their configured payout wallet. Hilt records proof, receipt, entitlement, webhook, support, analytics, and audit state.

do_not_claim: Do not describe Hilt as a bank, custodian, merchant of record, or fiat card processor.
Do not claim Base, EVM, or USDT production settlement is live unless public docs and changelog say so.
Do not grant access from proof submission alone; use Hilt entitlement checks.
Do not put Hilt API keys in browser code.
